3_1_1_collaborative_filtering.paper_comparison: algorithm sanity check; original papers use different corpora

3_1_2_matrix_factorization.paper_comparison: Netflix paper value is not directly comparable

3_1_3_factorization_machine.paper_comparison: functional reproduction; libFM paper protocols differ

3_2_1_dssm.paper_comparison: DSSM web-search click corpus is proprietary; verify structure and retrieval protocol, not absolute NDCG

3_2_2_mind.split: paper protocol: random 19:1 train/test; a deterministic seed records the sampled target
3_2_2_mind.paper_comparison: MIND Table 1/2: 351,356 users, 393,801 goods, 6,271,511 samples; absolute comparison is accepted only if these post-filter counts match

3_2_3_sasrec.filters: paper-defined iterative user/item 5-core; expected 6,040 users, 3,416 items, 999,611 actions
3_2_3_sasrec.split: paper protocol: leave last for test and penultimate for validation; every observed rating is implicit feedback
3_2_3_sasrec.model_protocol: 2 blocks, max length 200, embedding dimension 50, one attention head, dropout 0.2, Adam lr=0.001
3_2_3_sasrec.paper_comparison: compare with SASRec Table III only in full profile

3_3_2_din.paper_comparison: Alibaba corpus is proprietary; public Amazon protocol is reproducible

3_3_3_dien.paper_comparison: online CTR/eCPM values are not reproducible from public data

3_4_2_ple.split: official train file plus 1:1 validation/test split of the official test file
3_4_2_ple.paper_comparison: PLE reports Census-income offline experiments; Tencent online values remain proprietary

4_2_dlrm_hstu_practice.paper_comparison: use Meta public configs and identical sampled-softmax candidate count
